decisions.decision: Added MPS (Apple GPU) device detection to SentenceTransformerEmbedder and ModelScopeEmbedder
decisions.rationale: Code only checked CUDA, Mac users with Apple Silicon get stuck on CPU. Device selection now: CUDA > MPS > CPU

decisions.decision: Added get_by_filename() to DocumentRepository with fallback in get_cmd/multi_get_cmd
decisions.rationale: Users expect `sif get readme.md` to work, not just full paths

decisions.decision: Fixed _row_to_collection to include document_count and chunk_count from DB rows
decisions.rationale: Collection stats always showed 0 because fields were silently dropped during row-to-object conversion

decisions.decision: Added mark_indexed() method to Collection dataclass
decisions.rationale: DocumentIndexer called nonexistent method — latent bug not caught by tests
